products.title: Gilt-Framed Needlepoint Tapestry Panel

The dense stitching and flattened perspective gives the work a graphic quality, while the subject matter draws on long-standing decorative traditions.

products.title: Chinoiserie Screen
products.description: A chinoiserie screen decorated with figurative and landscape motifs arranged across folding panels. The flattened perspective and patterned surface recall historic lacquer and painted screens used as both partitions and ornament.

products.title: Vintage Dark Green Coffee Table
products.description: A dark green coffee table with a solid, rectilinear form and minimal ornamentation. The saturated finish lends weight and contrast, allowing colour to function as the primary decorative element.

products.title: Pair of Faux-Bamboo Arched Bookshelves

products.title: Pair of Grotto Shell-Back Chairs
products.description: A pair of grotto-style chairs with sculptural shell-form backs. The exaggerated curves and textural surfaces evoke natural forms, aligning the pieces with the tradition of fantastical garden ornament.

products.title: Regency Side Table
products.description: A Regency-style side table with balanced proportions and classical detailing. The controlled use of ornament reflects the period’s interest in order, symmetry, and antiquity.

products.title: Ornate Carved Console Table

products.title: White Chinoiserie Dressing Table Set

products.title: Balloton Water Glass Pink (Set of 6)
products.description: Our striking Balloton glasses are hand-blown on Murano, the island home of Venice's centuries-old glass trade. A classically elegant shape, the dark blue glasses feature an undulating honeycomb pattern. Made from the finest quality Venetian glass, they are a cheerful addition to any tabletop, whether for a relaxed family meal or a festive gathering of friends.

products.title: Wisteria Napkins (Set of 8)
products.description: The whimsical pattern of the Wisteria napkins originates from a collection of late 19th century wallpapers from Genoa - hometown to Renzo Mongiardino. Adorn your table with the Esmerelda Table Linen for a sophisticated and lavish celebratory mood. Pair with the Rubino placemats and Natale napkins to complete the look. products.description: Written by Lulu Lyte and Mitchell Owens Long fascinated with rattan's versatility, designer Lulu Lytle examines the enduring appeal of this sustainable tropical palm in Rattan: A World of Elegance and Charm. products.title: Ikat Placemats, Yellow (Set of 2)
products.description: Inspired by the geometric forms of traditional Ikats, this boldly patterned placemat will add instant energy and character to your table setting. Hand-woven on a loom, these placemats are sturdy yet flexible, and can be rolled up and stored away for convenience in between uses. Set of two.

products.description: Covers by Ralph Lauren. Published in April 2021. This limited edition is a true collector's item with only 50 numbered copies printed in antique paisley fabrics from the archive of Ralph Lauren Home. This issue is a "love letter to Milan," a meandering walk into some of the city's most interesting interiors. products.title: Speckled Serving Bowl, Burgundy
products.description: Handmade in Puglia with heart and tradition, the Speckled Serving Bowl features a scalloped edge and decorative border that undulates all around. Use it as a salad bowl or to display fruit. Its vibrant splatter pattern will liven up any space. Pair with our Speckled Shallow Bowls in a variety of colors to create our signature mix and match look.

products.title: Casa Cabana by Martina Mondadori
products.description: By Martina Mondadori Foreword by Aerin Lauder This sumptuous volume of stunning photographs, personal essays, and Italian recipes shows readers how to achieve the look made famous in interior-design circles by the ground­breaking and effortlessly cool Cabana magazine. products.title: Vera Stripe Napkins, Green (Set of 2)
products.description: These delightful Guri I Zi blue striped napkins are handmade in a village in the Albanian mountains. Keeping the textile tradition alive, artisans use a loom made entirely of wood, following the techniques passed down from generation to generation for over a century.

products.title: Righe Dinner Plate, Blue
products.description: Handcrafted in Umbria, the Righe plate is a playful addition to your table. Mix and match colors to create a vibrant table setting. The colorful stripes will allow you to combine these plates any items you may want. From a simple white tablecloth to a fun floral one, the possibilities are infinite.

products.description: D'Ascoli x Cabana Trompe L'Oeil Collection The Urbino Tablecloth features a bold ornamental design printed on 100% linen in trompe l’oeil effects imitating wood veneers, offered in two colors, “brun” and “blonde." products.description: D'Ascoli x Cabana Trompe L'Oeil Collection The Federico Napkin has a small geometric design reminiscent of marquetry - the art of wood veneer inlay - printed on 100% hand spun, hand woven cotton.
